overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a sunlit concrete drainage channel beneath an overpass with 'MERCY IS FOR THE WEAK' graffiti. The player explores a homeless encampment with a yellow food cart and NPCs, then continues down the channel past a guitar player.

tall electrical transmission towers with cables
hazy mountains visible beyond the channel end

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a wide, sunlit concrete drainage channel with graffiti-covered walls. The camera moves steadily toward a large overpass bridge in the distance, with power lines and mountains visible on the horizon.

segments.scene_description: The player enters the shaded area beneath the overpass where the graffiti 'MERCY IS FOR THE WEAK' becomes visible. A homeless encampment appears with a yellow food cart, white tent, and concrete barriers. A homeless NPC stands near debris on the left.

events.description: circles around the yellow food cart examining the grill and tent from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling the food cart and examining the encampment details including the grill with cooking food

segments.scene_description: The player circles around the yellow food cart, revealing a grill with cooking food and a small tent. An NPC in a yellow plaid shirt stands nearby with arms crossed. The camera moves around the encampment area under the bridge.

events.description: moves past the food cart to reveal NPCs gathered at a makeshift table under the bridge
turns away from the NPCs and walks back toward the open channel

agents.ego_description: approaching the NPCs at the makeshift table then turning to continue down the channel

person in yellow plaid shirt standing with arms crossed near the table

entered.detail: cluttered table with bottles, cans, and miscellaneous items
bright red plastic chair at the makeshift table

segments.scene_description: Moving past the food cart, the player discovers NPCs gathered at a makeshift table with a red plastic chair under the bridge. After observing the scene, the player turns and walks back toward the open channel, leaving the encampment behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open drainage channel with distant mountains

events.description: exits the shaded underpass back into the open sunlit channel
approaches the guitar player sitting on the concrete ledge

agents.ego_description: walking down the open channel toward the distant mountains and the guitar player

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete ledge playing acoustic guitar

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission towers with cables
hazy mountains visible beyond the channel end
derelict cars and trucks parked along the right wall
person with long hair sitting on the concrete slope playing guitar

segments.scene_description: The player exits the shaded underpass back into the bright sunlight of the open drainage channel. Abandoned vehicles line the right wall while power lines and mountains appear in the distance. The camera approaches an NPC sitting on the concrete ledge playing an acoustic guitar.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a concrete drainage channel that transitions from bright open sunlight into a shaded urban encampment before returning to the open air. It begins with a steady walk through the wide, sunlit channel toward a distant overpass bridge, with power lines and mountains framing the horizon. As the camera moves beneath the bridge, the light dims and the environment shifts into a homeless settlement featuring a yellow food cart, a white tent, and graffiti reading MERCY IS FOR THE WEAK. The camera then circles through the encampment, passing a grill and NPCs gathered around a makeshift table with a red plastic chair, before turning back toward the exit. Finally, the scene opens back into the bright sunlight of the channel, passing abandoned vehicles along the wall as the camera approaches an NPC playing an acoustic guitar on a concrete ledge.
